paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 sessions. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from Stocktwits discussing the company's zero revenue and $486M loss, as well as expectations to sign binding agreements with tenants over the next year.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 and 19 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K form from July 15, 2026, announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes due 2031, and an 8-K form from July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records.
